examples: Eggs can be prepared in a variety of ways: deviled eggs, over-easy, omelet style, scrambled, and hard-boiled.
Enjoy a satisfying scrambled egg, omelet or frittata (an Italian omelet with diced vegetables and meats) in less than 15 minutes.
After all, if eggs fall in price, at least you can make an omelet.
He recently cooked a steamed omelet on Nightline, hosting the television program at IV's lab.
